name: forge
description: Codebase-aware specification engine. V3 flow-reversal mode (plugin v4.0.0): brownfield runs use flow-mapper + node-by-node flow-interviewer to produce grounded flow deltas instead of end-state specs. Researches your code deeply, conducts a grounded interview, and produces foundry-ready specs (V2) or flow deltas (V3). Forge plans. Foundry builds.
